---
title: "SWC Source Comparison: SEM-Focused (Measured vs. Imputed GAM)"
author: "Analysis Pipeline"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 12
    fig_height: 8
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.show = "asis"
)

proj_root <- normalizePath(
  if (dir.exists(file.path(getwd(), "data", "interim"))) {
    getwd()
  } else if (dir.exists(file.path(dirname(getwd()), "data", "interim"))) {
    dirname(getwd())
  } else {
    stop("Could not locate project root")
  },
  winslash = "/"
)

setwd(proj_root)
suppressMessages({
  source("functions/_source.R")
  source("functions/x-effect-size-factorial.R")
  source("scripts/x-structural-equation-model.R")
  source("scripts/x-combining-glmm-sem.R")
})

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

# Goal

This notebook now focuses only on SEM comparisons between SWC sources:

- `measured`: nearest observed SWC within a +/- 7 day window
- `imputed_gam`: daily GAM-imputed SWC

No temporal GLMM comparison is included.

# Controls

```{r controls}
soil_type <- "both"
force_refit <- FALSE

swc_levels <- c("measured", "imputed_gam")
species_levels <- c("fagus", "quercus")
interaction_levels <- c(FALSE, TRUE)

# Same trait grid as 3-comprehensive-analysis.Rmd
model_grid <- tribble(
  ~section, ~data_name, ~resp_var,
  "Chlorophyll", "chlorophyll", "chl",
  "Tree Condition", "condition", "condition",
  "Growth Height", "growth", "height",
  "Growth Diameter", "growth", "diameter",
  "Phenology Stage", "phenology", "stage",
  "Quantum Yield", "quantum_yield", "qy",
  "Senescence Percent", "senescence", "percent_senesced",
  "Senescence Chlorophyll", "senescence", "chlavg"
)
```

# SEM Helpers

```{r helper-functions}
fit_sem <- function(data_name, resp_var, species, include_interaction, swc_source) {
  tryCatch(
    run_sem_for_trait(
      type = "tree",
      data_name = data_name,
      resp_var = resp_var,
      species = species,
      soil_type = soil_type,
      include_interaction = include_interaction,
      scale_all_numeric = TRUE,
      do_rfe = FALSE,
      swc_source = swc_source,
      force_run = force_refit
    ),
    error = function(e) {
      message(
        "SEM fit failed for ", data_name, "/", resp_var,
        " species=", species,
        " include_interaction=", include_interaction,
        " swc_source=", swc_source,
        " -> ", conditionMessage(e)
      )
      NULL
    }
  )
}

plot_sem_pair <- function(res_meas, res_imp, panel_title = NULL) {
  p_meas <- if (!is.null(res_meas) && !is.null(res_meas$plot)) {
    res_meas$plot + ggtitle("Measured SWC")
  } else {
    ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle("Measured SWC (missing)")
  }

  p_imp <- if (!is.null(res_imp) && !is.null(res_imp$plot)) {
    res_imp$plot + ggtitle("Imputed SWC")
  } else {
    ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle("Imputed SWC (missing)")
  }

  p <- p_meas | p_imp
  if (!is.null(panel_title)) {
    p <- p + plot_annotation(title = panel_title)
  }
  p
}

extract_sem_r2 <- function(res) {
  if (is.null(res) || is.null(res$sem)) {
    return(tibble(
      sem_r2_swc_marginal = NA_real_,
      sem_r2_swc_conditional = NA_real_,
      sem_r2_resp_marginal = NA_real_,
      sem_r2_resp_conditional = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  r2_tbl <- tryCatch(piecewiseSEM::rsquared(res$sem), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(r2_tbl)) {
    return(tibble(
      sem_r2_swc_marginal = NA_real_,
      sem_r2_swc_conditional = NA_real_,
      sem_r2_resp_marginal = NA_real_,
      sem_r2_resp_conditional = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  tibble(
    sem_r2_swc_marginal = r2_tbl$Marginal[r2_tbl$Response == "swc"][1],
    sem_r2_swc_conditional = r2_tbl$Conditional[r2_tbl$Response == "swc"][1],
    sem_r2_resp_marginal = r2_tbl$Marginal[r2_tbl$Response == "y"][1],
    sem_r2_resp_conditional = r2_tbl$Conditional[r2_tbl$Response == "y"][1]
  )
}

extract_sem_paths <- function(res) {
  empty <- tibble(
    factor = character(), effect_class = character(), path = character(),
    estimate = double(), p_value = double(), abs_estimate = double()
  )

  if (is.null(res)) return(empty)

  out <- list()

  if (!is.null(res$effects) && nrow(res$effects) > 0) {
    main_long <- bind_rows(
      res$effects %>% transmute(factor, effect_class = "main", path = "to_swc (a)", estimate = a, p_value = p_a),
      res$effects %>% transmute(factor, effect_class = "main", path = "to_target_direct (c')", estimate = c_direct, p_value = p_c),
      res$effects %>% transmute(factor, effect_class = "main", path = "to_target_indirect (a*b)", estimate = indirect, p_value = p_ind),
      res$effects %>% transmute(factor, effect_class = "main", path = "to_target_total", estimate = total, p_value = p_tot)
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        abs_estimate = abs(estimate)
      )

    out[[length(out) + 1L]] <- main_long
  }

  if (!is.null(res$effects_int) && nrow(res$effects_int) > 0) {
    int_long <- bind_rows(
      res$effects_int %>% transmute(factor, effect_class = "interaction", path = "to_swc (a)", estimate = a, p_value = p_a),
      res$effects_int %>% transmute(factor, effect_class = "interaction", path = "to_target_direct (c')", estimate = c_direct, p_value = p_c),
      res$effects_int %>% transmute(factor, effect_class = "interaction", path = "to_target_indirect (a*b)", estimate = indirect, p_value = p_ind),
      res$effects_int %>% transmute(factor, effect_class = "interaction", path = "to_target_total", estimate = total, p_value = p_tot)
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        abs_estimate = abs(estimate)
      )

    out[[length(out) + 1L]] <- int_long
  }

  if (!length(out)) return(empty)
  bind_rows(out)
}
```

# Fit Full SEM Grid Once

```{r fit-all-sems}
fit_tasks <- tidyr::crossing(
  model_grid,
  species = species_levels,
  include_interaction = interaction_levels,
  swc_source = swc_levels
) %>%
  mutate(
    result = purrr::pmap(
      list(data_name, resp_var, species, include_interaction, swc_source),
      fit_sem
    )
  )

metrics_long <- fit_tasks %>%
  mutate(metrics = purrr::map(result, extract_sem_r2)) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(metrics) %>%
  mutate(target_label = paste0(section, " | ", species, if_else(include_interaction, " | int", " | no-int")))

sem_paths_long <- fit_tasks %>%
  mutate(
    sem_paths = purrr::map(result, extract_sem_paths)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(sem_paths)
```

```{r summary-data-prep}
sem_metric_cols <- c(
  "sem_r2_swc_marginal",
  "sem_r2_swc_conditional",
  "sem_r2_resp_marginal",
  "sem_r2_resp_conditional"
)

metrics_wide <- metrics_long %>%
  select(section, data_name, resp_var, species, include_interaction, target_label, swc_source, all_of(sem_metric_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(sem_metric_cols), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = swc_source, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(delta_imputed_minus_measured = imputed_gam - measured)
```

# Faceted 1:1 SEM Metrics (All At Once)

```{r faceted-1to1-sem-metrics, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
metrics_plot_df <- metrics_wide %>%
  filter(is.finite(measured), is.finite(imputed_gam)) %>%
  mutate(
    metric = factor(
      metric,
      levels = c(
        "sem_r2_swc_marginal",
        "sem_r2_swc_conditional",
        "sem_r2_resp_marginal",
        "sem_r2_resp_conditional"
      ),
      labels = c(
        "SWC R2 Marginal",
        "SWC R2 Conditional",
        "Target R2 Marginal",
        "Target R2 Conditional"
      )
    ),
    interaction_label = if_else(include_interaction, "With interaction", "No interaction")
  )

p_metrics <- ggplot(metrics_plot_df, aes(x = measured, y = imputed_gam, color = species)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "grey40") +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = section), size = 2.8, check_overlap = TRUE, vjust = -0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_grid(interaction_label ~ metric) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "SEM performance by SWC source",
    subtitle = "Points above 1:1 line indicate higher metric with imputed SWC",
    x = "Measured SWC",
    y = "Imputed SWC",
    color = "Species"
  ) +
  theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(p_metrics)
```

# SEM Factor Influence Summary

```{r sem-factor-influence, fig.width=16, fig.height=10}
# Focus on no-interaction SEM for clean factor-level comparison.
infl_df <- sem_paths_long %>%
  filter(include_interaction == FALSE, effect_class == "main") %>%
  filter(path %in% c("to_swc (a)", "to_target_direct (c')", "to_target_indirect (a*b)", "to_target_total"))

summarise_importance <- function(df, species_keep = NULL) {
  x <- df
  if (!is.null(species_keep)) {
    x <- x %>% filter(species == species_keep)
  }

  x %>%
    group_by(swc_source, factor, path) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_abs = mean(abs_estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
      se_abs = sd(abs_estimate, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(dplyr::n()),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

plot_importance_panel <- function(df_imp, title_txt) {
  ggplot(df_imp, aes(x = reorder(factor, mean_abs), y = mean_abs, fill = swc_source)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.72) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(ymin = pmax(0, mean_abs - se_abs), ymax = mean_abs + se_abs),
      position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
      width = 0.2
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ path, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      title = title_txt,
      x = "Factor",
      y = "Mean |effect|",
      fill = "SWC source"
    ) +
    theme_linedraw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

p_all <- plot_importance_panel(
  summarise_importance(infl_df),
  "All species"
)

p_fag <- plot_importance_panel(
  summarise_importance(infl_df, species_keep = "fagus"),
  "Fagus"
)

p_que <- plot_importance_panel(
  summarise_importance(infl_df, species_keep = "quercus"),
  "Quercus"
)

p_combined <- (p_all | p_fag | p_que) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.tag = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")
  )

print(p_combined)
```

# Full SEM Figure Comparison

```{r full-sem-figure-comparison, results='asis', fig.width=16, fig.height=7}
get_fit <- function(section, data_name, resp_var, species, include_interaction, swc_source) {
  fit_tasks %>%
    filter(
      .data$section == section,
      .data$data_name == data_name,
      .data$resp_var == resp_var,
      .data$species == species,
      .data$include_interaction == include_interaction,
      .data$swc_source == swc_source
    ) %>%
    pull(result) %>%
    .[[1]]
}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(model_grid))) {
  row <- model_grid[i, ]

  cat("\n\n## ", row$section, "\n", sep = "")

  for (sp in species_levels) {
    cat("\n\n### Species: ", sp, "\n", sep = "")

    res_meas_no_int <- get_fit(row$section, row$data_name, row$resp_var, sp, FALSE, "measured")
    res_imp_no_int <- get_fit(row$section, row$data_name, row$resp_var, sp, FALSE, "imputed_gam")

    cat("\n\n#### SEM (No Interaction): Measured vs Imputed\n")
    print(
      plot_sem_pair(
        res_meas_no_int,
        res_imp_no_int,
        panel_title = paste0("SEM no interaction: ", row$data_name, " / ", row$resp_var, " / ", sp)
      )
    )

    res_meas_int <- get_fit(row$section, row$data_name, row$resp_var, sp, TRUE, "measured")
    res_imp_int <- get_fit(row$section, row$data_name, row$resp_var, sp, TRUE, "imputed_gam")

    cat("\n\n#### SEM (With Interaction): Measured vs Imputed\n")
    print(
      plot_sem_pair(
        res_meas_int,
        res_imp_int,
        panel_title = paste0("SEM with interaction: ", row$data_name, " / ", row$resp_var, " / ", sp)
      )
    )
  }
}
```

# Session Info

```{r sessioninfo}
sessionInfo()
```
